stemHtml: In a multi-pilot aircraft, what action might need to be taken by a crew member if another crew member becomes incapacitated in flight?

options.a: Declare an emergency to ensure priority landing at the nearest suitable aerodrome.
options.b: Carry out a steep descent in the event of sinus or ear pain.
options.c: Continue as normal without taking any other action as one crew member can still land the aircraft.
options.d: Ensure that the upper torso restraint of the affected crew member is loosened, to ensure unrestricted breathing.
